[{"Name":"Nicholas pocha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJggYIPvRg4TKqJkbr8i7VUuLlF14YjvzrRiazxYF58teAGgw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In spring 2024 I purchased a $2,000 service credit through Kootenay Auction. Communication was good at first, but after declining a very high quote for re shingling a small shed, responses became slow and often nonexistent. I agreed to have siding installed instead and was told the work would be done in the spring.
The job ended up taking over a year and a half to complete, with most of 2025 going by without replies despite monthly emails. Only after giving an ultimatum in early 2026 did the work finally get scheduled. The response I received at that time was also condescending, saying the job was small and negative reviews would not speed things up.
When the work was finally completed, the quality was disappointing. Paint was left on the wall beside the siding, the top above the door was crooked, the sides were not painted, and the colour was not properly matched.
Overall, poor communication, long delays, and sloppy workmanship made this a frustrating experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kaitlynn Larner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL39yFMVDdMCHdXJPKOgwidJb00vAVvk5BLMMAtJB4LIeXHBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Shotty work, did not complete contract that was agreed upon, after numerous lapses in deadlines he admitted he was not qualified to perform work. Unable to get ahold of owner to complete repairs had to have an inspection done that found lots of deficiencies in the work completed. No owner follow up whatsoever on customer satisfaction even when asked to show up to the site. Gave the employees direction to shortcut the repairs when they were sent to site without scope of work. Still awaiting completion. Removed negative reviews and continues to reboot Facebook page when he is given feedback he doesn’t like.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Candis Spiers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbsGtF3KqV_i6ekG2dg4JlCq83x7A9eeoVWdH-CEyCoCH0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Noah at Adaptibuild was in our neighborhood shortly after a wind storm that caused shingle damage to many homes on our street. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julie M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0iQxTc1ccQRdVUTLkMJyRPaHrYRhOJ0bUSNDof53x85C063M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I contacted Noah at Adaptibuilt to see if their scope of work included Columere Park, just outside of Fairmont, for a new roofing project—and it did. From our first communication through to completion, Noah and his team were professional, responsive, and patient, answering all of my many questions.

Our roofline was a bit complex, but the crew handled it with skill and precision. The quality of workmanship was outstanding, and just as impressive was how they left the site immaculately clean at the end of each workday.

I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Adaptibuilt to friends and family—they truly delivered top-notch service from start to finish.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tiffany Slasor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOBVgCvxjCGXU9e8qSuRYbhYk-ntZK027paolAYjEmvZiECA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Noah and his team are fantastic! When they came to do the work they were very quick and detail orientated. They cleaned up meticulously after each day they were here! Never left a mess! They were all so polite! Our roof is now leak free! We HIGHLY RECOMMEND them! Very well priced with fantastic work!
Tiffany and Ray Obalek","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Porcina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOh8LA4EwnVmxyb2RiPIDqSYbw_cAQagpuQftMlk5jFb2kdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are very happy with our newly replaced shingle roof done by Adaptibuild, Cranbrook. Looks amazing, thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Rothero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8xkomISkFYPo-3O4f3MoHVJ_i6oNdNoOZWmVaax7rIgd6I8Zi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On Wednesday, April the 9th, 2025 the roof on my house which was in very, very bad shape was replaced by what i consider to be a wonderful, hardworking company named AdaptiBuild Exteriors.  I was amazed by their work, they started in the morning and didn't stop until they were finished.  The work commenced shortly after around 8:30 AM and they never stopped until it was finished at about 5:45 PM in the afternoon.  They took short lunch breaks, two at a time - but there was always someone working on the roof.  I was overwhelmed and so glad that I got them to do the work.  I now have a new, beautiful roof with 40 year Mystique Weather-Tite Shingles.  I would recommend them to everyone.  Believe me, I can't praise them enough. I would recommend them to anyone - you will have a great job done and in the end will receive "Peace of Mind". Thank you Adaptibuild - I will be recommending you to all my friends. Linda Rothero.  Thank you Noah and your great, efficient workers.  I now have a beautiful new roof and "Peace of Mind".","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cynthia Heschl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILwFKmbXN9DCgFI7DBx5UG1II7XqmaFTVXJhTHGCfL1EysuA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Noah and his great crew were a wonderful company to deal with. Everyone who works with this company was trustworthy, honest, reliable, and genuine. Thanks to each of you, we very much appreciated all the work and energy you put into home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lindsay Hetu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLruejWp7Mbhtih8nCuRR5zuHV8adGRh2tECBsoghDObvHQkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So happy with every step of our build with  Geoff’s. While other companies toured us through expensive and inflated showrooms with no idea of costs and cookie cutter designs, geoffs sends you choices of everything you need to consider AND the cost. The personalized schedule of activities taking place daily was fantastic in helping us know what would be done each week. Highly recommend geoffs for a more personal build experience. As busy working professionals, we strongly valued the communication and timelines. Plus the office staff and crews are amazing! 10/10.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH55Tc2AE&fid=0x0:0x64e37bbce1acafe6"],"When":"2024-9-9"},{"Name":"Chris B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2-ymbXrgxmhzvea7Q8fUWdntvR9lLjMAkrugDdckjKjD_FQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've just finished some extensive renovations with Geoff's, inside and out, over about five months, and we couldn't be happier with the results.  The work is undoubtedly to a high standard, but the service really stood out too.  The team always had time for our questions or changes of mind, and always came up with constructive solutions if we encountered a problem.  All the folks who worked at our house, both Geoff's own crew and subcontractors, were polite, pleasant and respectful.  Would recommend without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Harry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKctJijL2MNJt1la046toFswPZfk_gz3G6bctmffE_Uar8ElQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In 2018, Geoff's Contracting built our first home in Mount Royal.   It was a three floor house with a large attached garage built on a difficult grade.  We are seniors with many years of experience in home building and renovations.  Before we picked a contractor for that build, we got quotes and proposals from a number of other builders.  Geoff Berry was by far the most organized contractor and worked to provide every feature we wanted in this home at a very competitive price.

Upon signing the contract, Geoff provided us with a detailed schedule naming all the sub trades, the dates they were to be on site, plus what was expected of us, like the dates we were to have our choices made on colors, types of doors, plumbing and light fixtures.  The home was completed on schedule, in just over 6 months and under budget.

We loved the home for over five years, then decided to move to a smaller home and yard. We experienced a sense of urgency, as our home sold quickly and we needed to build again.  Geoff and his team, rose to the occasion.  With the same professional approach, they expedited the plans and obtained the permits while agreeing to build over the winter to accommodate our needs.

Again a very professional product,  on schedule and on budget.  Geoff's staff and the trades' staff were all a pleasure to work with and because we knew what to expect the second time around, the building of our new beautiful new home was a pleasant,  non-stressful experience.

Geoff's Contracting is an honest, professional company that is an asset to the industry.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Terry Bedwell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFvqou5ZSqR7s4aMLkTyqzn68tjCNWqtkADSekwbFjjxNv0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our Kitchen renovated by Geoff's contracting, they did a over the top job. We enjoyed working with Geoff's contracting and very proud to show off photos.  Thank you Geoff, Pam and your team.","Images":null,"When":""}]
